ops.body: W2 shipped as 699098d8 (CI green, 745 tests): primary-clears guard in _dominates (set-difference over deterministic preference_misses; band/Pareto untouched; bit-identity pinned incl. 5000-population equivalence sweep vs @-), FIT_MISS_CODES, per-code primary participation (judgment override > code's own declared priority > default — the strongest-of-several factor fold serves only the verdict lane), declared preference priorities folded into _tiers + trip profile (closes the priority-validated-but-never-consumed gap found mid-wave; regression test now runs with ONLY preferences.cabin declared), deterministic notable trigger (per-code, coverage-deduped vs assess picks, skips verify-artifact gone/degraded). Fable finder+refuter replaced the quota-dead sol lanes; accepted: note-sibling escalation (both reviewers, executed counterexample), coverage dedupe, gone filter, cleared-set caching. Refuter PROVED the _assign_cost_tiers collapse branch dead (sum-decrease invariant; 200k triples, 0 cycles/empty fronts) — W5 cites this for the planned deletion. Informational (no action, unreachable): zero-axis intransitivity, negative-total antisymmetry. Design doc captured: cc-notes doc 761ade8. W4 in flight (opus xhigh ×2 lanes).
